response.step_by_step_log: The video contains two main song performances by Laplus Darknesss. For the first song, the title "Darkness" was identified from the on-screen text. For the second song, "-ERROR" and "niki" were clearly identified in the on-screen text during the transition at 02:40. I searched for "Darkness" Japanese and English lyrics, but no definitive song was found under that specific title by that artist (it likely refers to her own branding). I then searched for " -ERROR niki Japanese and English lyrics" and successfully found the lyrics. The JSON mapping was then created based on these findings.
response.global_summary: A two-song musical performance by Laplus Darknesss. The first is an upbeat track titled "Darkness" (as indicated on-screen) followed by a short dance break, and the second is a cover of the song "-ERROR" by niki.

scenes.description: Character performs a dance song while the text "#ラプラス・バースデイ2025" and "Darkness" are displayed.
Three performers dance, then a transition to the character singing on stage with text "-ERROR" and "作詞・作曲:niki" on screen.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Can you see the tears in my eyes?
They are blurring into the color of life
What did I leave behind? What did I give?
I ask myself, and I break down
In this world where blue, red, and white are mixed together
I am screaming
What was I searching for as I walked?
I chased after it, and I grew tired
How much longer? Is it an abnormality?
Am I broken?
Yes, I am broken
Even so, I still want to breathe
I want to breathe
